---
title: "🔒 Private Comments"
description: "Private Comments allow you to exchange direct, private messages with another person inside a dot. These conversations are visible only to you and the selected user, making them perfect for sharing sensitive feedback, clarifying details one-on-one, or coordinating quietly without interrupting the main team discussion. This option ensures privacy, focus, and a clean separation between public and personal communication."

navigation: true
authors:
  - name: Digital Harbor
    username: "dharbor.com"
    avatar: data:image/png;base64,
    to: https://digitalharborbolivia.com/

### 📝 How to use Private Comments

🧾 Navigate to the dot where you want to start or view a private conversation.

👤 Open the Comments panel and choose the person you want to message privately.

🔄 Before sending the message, click the Private Comment icon to switch from public comments to a private comment.

🔒 Type your message and press Enter. Only you and the selected person will be able to see this conversation.

💬 Exchange replies back and forth just like a normal comment thread — but fully private.

<template>
  <div class="border rounded-lg shadow-md mt-4 h-60">
    <iframe src="/quickstart-capture.png" class="rounded-lg w-full h-full" scrolling="no" frameborder="0"></iframe>

  </div>
</template>


### 💡 Tips

* Use private comments to share confidential feedback or context meant for one person.

* Ideal for reviewing drafts, giving early opinions, or clarifying misunderstandings privately.

* You can maintain multiple private threads with different users inside the same dot.
